title: Smoking Mobs
description: When a mob is on fire they create smoke!
body:
![Smoking Creeper](https://media.giphy.com/media/m92ysWTztRFhVvxfQV/giphy.gif)

# Requirements?
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

# Q&A
### Discord?/Source code/I have an *issue!*
<- Side panel, "External resources" ->

### Forge/Backport?
Probably not, I mainly play Fabric 1.18.2.
Not sure about 1.19.2.

### Curse Forge?
Nope, Modrinth is better at mod-hosting literally everywhere.

# Configure?
All of the configurations for this mod are in tags.
Look in the mod jar, they should be pretty self-explanatory.
